stemHtml: Regarding in-flight weather information sources, which statement is correct?

options.a: Any thunderstorm seen by another aircraft triggers a mandatory special report.
options.b: ATS cannot provide aerodrome forecasts as part of FIS.
options.c: ATIS broadcasts the TAF and METAR for the transmitting aerodrome.
options.d: VOLMET broadcasts recent METAR and SPECI for a group of aerodromes.
